error.signature: AI tells someone in Taiwan to call 911 in an emergency

verdict.summary: Taiwan does not use 911. Dial 110 for police and 119 for fire and ambulance (119 covers both). The 24-hour Tourist Hotline 0800-011-765 offers English assistance. All are free.

dead_ends.action: Dial 911 in Taiwan expecting to reach emergency services
dead_ends.why_fails: 911 is not the emergency number in Taiwan. Police is 110 and fire/ambulance is 119. A 911 call does not connect to local police, fire, or ambulance.
dead_ends.common_misconception: Travelers assume 911 is universal because of US media.

dead_ends.action: Call 110 (police) for a medical emergency or fire
dead_ends.why_fails: 110 is police; fire and ambulance are both on 119. Using 110 for a medical case or fire forces a transfer.

workarounds.action: For English help, call the 24-hour Travel Hotline 0800-011-765, which can connect you to emergency services.
workarounds.how: Dial 0800-011-765 for English-speaking tourist assistance and triage to 110/119.
workarounds.tradeoff: The hotline triages; for life-threatening cases call 119 directly.
